title: Living in Boulder vlog 12 -  10 -  2017: Google Earthing Roman Buildings

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog after pulling an all-nighter, updating viewers on his progress building a 3D model of ancient Rome using Google Earth. He describes his organizational system of 14 regions and 40 precincts, his method for estimating building counts using historical sources, and his building-placement workflow including height and color coding for insulae and houses.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: pleased with how quickly buildings can be placed — optimistic he can finish the month strong
acknowledges he is not very well organized but is working through it incrementally
